author: Neil
text: I've really appreciated the work Rod has done for me recently. My 2005 Camry needed the air-con compressor replaced, and he was able to fit me in quickly.

author: Claire Barker
text: I would 100% recommend Rockets to anyone. Extremely pleased with the work they did for me in an incredibly timely manner at a super fair and no doubt hard to beat price.

author: Sarah Cavanagh
text: Excellent, honest, professional service. Rod helped me out, clearly explained and fixed some previous sub-standard work done by someone else.

author: C.D.
text: Came to my residence within the hour after my initial call about headlights blown and dimming. Polite and personable, fixed the problem in an expeditious manner.

author: Karen Parkyn
text: Thanks for reassuring me and taking the time to check my sunroof panic! Great communication and will highly recommend you and use you again.

author: Toni Wilkeis
text: Prompt, efficient and excellent on trouble shooting and fault finding. Very reasonably priced, local guy. Definitely recommend!
